RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Letter of 03/19/04 from Moving Party Defendant Schaeffer advises the Court that the matter has settled. DEFENDANT KEN SCHAEFFER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
